tasks.build: deno task --filter @workspace/server build && deno task --filter web build
tasks.build:prod: deno task build && deno task package:prod
tasks.package:web: rm -rf build/www && mkdir -p build && cp -R apps/web/dist build/www
tasks.preview: deno task build && deno task package:web && deno task start:preview
tasks.dev: deno task --cwd apps/server dev & deno task --cwd apps/web dev & wait
tasks.fmt: deno task --filter @workspace/contracts fmt && deno task --filter @workspace/api fmt && deno task --filter @workspace/db fmt && deno task --filter @workspace/ui fmt && deno task --filter @workspace/server fmt && deno task --filter web fmt
tasks.lint: deno task --filter @workspace/contracts lint && deno task --filter @workspace/api lint && deno task --filter @workspace/db lint && deno task --filter @workspace/ui lint && deno task --filter @workspace/server lint && deno task --filter web lint
tasks.lint:github: deno task --filter @workspace/contracts lint -- --deny-warnings --format=github && deno task --filter @workspace/api lint -- --deny-warnings --format=github && deno task --filter @workspace/db lint -- --deny-warnings --format=github && deno task --filter @workspace/ui lint -- --deny-warnings --format=github && deno task --filter @workspace/server lint -- --deny-warnings --format=github && deno task --filter web lint -- --deny-warnings --format=github
tasks.lint:ci: deno task --filter @workspace/contracts lint -- --deny-warnings && deno task --filter @workspace/api lint -- --deny-warnings && deno task --filter @workspace/db lint -- --deny-warnings && deno task --filter @workspace/ui lint -- --deny-warnings && deno task --filter @workspace/server lint -- --deny-warnings && deno task --filter web lint -- --deny-warnings
tasks.typecheck: deno task --filter @workspace/contracts typecheck && deno task --filter @workspace/api typecheck && deno task --filter @workspace/db typecheck && deno task --filter @workspace/ui typecheck && deno task --filter @workspace/server typecheck && deno task --filter web typecheck
